sections.paragraph:
Original: איתי אתּי

Transliteration: 'ittay 'ı̂ythay

Phonetic: it-tah'ee

BDB Definition:

Ittai or Ithai = "with me"
  1. a Gittite commander from Gath in David's army
  2. one of David's 30 mighty warriors, a Benjamite

Origin: from H854

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
